description: A collections agent that handles debt collection calls with full regulatory compliance. Looks up account status, processes payment arrangements, and detects cease-and-desist requests. Includes FDCPA compliance guardrails and mini-Miranda disclosure requirements.
shortDescription: Compliant debt collection with account lookup and payment arrangements.

locked.lockReason: Set by template — changing the agent type would break workflow guardrails
Controlled by template to ensure consistent performance
Core prompt is managed by the template to maintain guardrails and compliance
Collections templates require a fixed temperature for regulatory compliance
